name: City Bus Simulator VR | Bus driving game

reviews.review_description: I don't like the graphics it's not what the picture shows the screenshot looks fake and I jumped in the game it looked at nothing like what your advertised The graphics are bad it doesn't feel like I'm really driving a real bus it feels fake and cartoonish your title is misleading I was really looking forward to this it's not worth the $10 your charge for I play better driving games on the quest for better graphics than this please give me a refund I wasted my money in time The picture is misleading on the title The graphics look nothing like the way you show it The answer of the bus is bad I feel like a cash grab I don't think it's worth the $10 you advertise I would love to have a refund please The screenshot pictures that you got on the cover it doesn't look nothing like in a game The characters on the screenshot it don't look like nothing in the game The graphics is very poor it's not fun and exciting The bus look fake it's supposed to be a bus simulator driving game when you start off in a school bus and the school bus don't look great The buildings look fake you can run red lights and it doesn't doc you for that you can go towards a person and you a ghost right through them All the characters look the same and fake if the game looked at the way you show it on the advertising picture it will be a fun game with the graphics you advertise but it's not that explains why you didn't post a video please give me a refund I'm wasted my money I wish the game was good but it's not just being honest

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. 
We want to clarify that all screenshots shown on the store are taken directly from the real in-game environment and are not edited or fake. That said, we understand that VR can feel different once you’re inside the headset compared to viewing store images.

We’re actively working on upcoming updates that will introduce new buses, improved character variety, and additional content to further enhance the experience. Development is ongoing, and player feedback like yours helps guide future improvements.

Thank you for trying the game and for being honest with your feedback. We appreciate your support and hope future updates deliver a better experience.
